name: Bug report
about: Something in the configurator, an export, or the hosted kit is wrong
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**What's wrong**
A clear description of the bug.

**To reproduce**
1. Configure '...'
2. Export / copy the `<link>` for '...'
3. See '...'

**Expected**
What you expected to happen.

**Which surface**
- [ ] The configurator (uicockpit.com / local dev)
- [ ] A download export (which: tokens.css / Tailwind / shadcn / …)
- [ ] The hosted kit (`kit.uicockpit.com/k/…`)

**Your kit link or hash** (if relevant — it encodes your exact setup)
```
https://kit.uicockpit.com/k/...
```

**Environment**
Browser / OS / framework you're pasting into.

**Screenshots**
If applicable.
